Sequential write of 3200 x 32bit words has been widened by 2: 1600 x 64bit words
Start index of the access is unaligned

Multiple burst reads of length 8464 and bit width 32 in loop 'LOAD_IC' has been inferred on bundle 'AXI_IN'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

Multiple burst writes of length 1600 and bit width 64 has been inferred on bundle 'AXI_OUT'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.
